history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young Asian male runner, wearing a bright cyan short-sleeved running shirt with an Asics logo on the right chest and dark blue compression tights, is in motion during a night race. He has a race bib with the number "22128" prominently displayed on his chest and is wearing blue-tinted athletic sunglasses on his forehead. His left arm is raised with a thumbs-up gesture, and his right arm is extended slightly forward, also with a thumb pointing forward, as if cheering or encouraging. He has a slight smile and is looking towards the camera. His running shoes are light grey with bright pink and blue accents.

The background is blurred but suggests an urban setting at night. Behind him, a large, light-colored statue of a person in a uniform, possibly a monument, is visible, illuminated with a cool blue and purple light. Further in the background, city lights are blurred into bokeh circles of various colors, including white, yellow, and red, against a deep blue night sky. Other runners are visible in the mid-ground, also blurred, with one runner in a purple and black shirt and another in a red shirt. The overall lighting is dramatic, with the runner being the main subject illuminated by artificial lights, creating a sense of energy and determination. The color palette is dominated by blues, cyans, and purples, with pops of color from the runner's attire and the city lights. The mood is energetic, celebratory, and triumphant, capturing the spirit of a night marathon. The image has a shallow depth of field, emphasizing the runner and blurring the surroundings to create a dynamic and focused composition. The style is photographic, with a slight cinematic feel due to the lighting and bokeh.
